somali.5_consecutive_safe_landings: 5 degitaan oo isdaba joog ah oo ammaan ah
somali.10_consecutive_safe_landings: 10 degitaan oo isdaba joog ah oo ammaan ah
somali.solve_5_math_challenges_correctly: Xalli 5 caqabadood oo xisaabeed si sax ah
somali.land_10_aircraft_with_zero_conflicts: Dejiso 10+ diyaaradood iyada oo aan iskudhac jirin
somali.maintain_90_efficiency_with_10_landing: Ilaali waxtarka 90%+ iyada oo leh 10+ degitaan
somali.assign_runway_first_r: ⚠️ Marka hore u qoondee waddada duulista (R)
somali.guide_aircraft_safely_solve_rate_probl: Hagid diyaaradaha si ammaan ah. Xalli dhibaatooyinka heerka. Ku takhasus xisaabta duulista.
somali.light_traffic_generous_spacing_good_fo: Taraafik fudud, kala fogaansho weyn — wanaagsan kontoroolayaasha cusub.
somali.manageable_load_focus_on_technique_wit: Culeys la maareyn karo — diiradda saar farsamada iyada oo aan cadaadis waqti jirin.
somali.realistic_airport_sequencing_required_: Garoon dhab ah — isku xigxiga ayaa loo baahan yahay, iskudhac waa suurtagal.
somali.high_load_expect_missed_approaches_fue: Culeys sare — filo ku guuldareysiga soo dhawaanshaha, cadaadis shidaal.
somali.saturated_staffing_runway_capacity_exc: Buux dhaafay — awoodda shaqaalaha/waddooyinka duulista ayaa la dhaafay.
somali.move_five_operational_sliders_predict_: Dhaqaaji shanta sliderro ee howlgalka. Saadaali sida mid kasta u falgalo ka hor inta aanad bilaabin fadhi. Dhibco ma jiraan, daaha ma jiro — adiga ayaa qiimeeya faham kaaga.
somali.your_hypothesis_what_combo_do_you_expe: Mala-awaalkaaga (isku-darka kee ayaad filaysaa inuu marka hore burburiyo howlaha?)
somali.e_g_low_separation_high_spawn_rate_com: tusaale, kala fogaansho hooseeya + heer soo muuqasho sare ayaa isku ururaya ka hor inta dabayshu muhiim noqon...
somali.which_two_sliders_are_most_coupled_do_: Labada slider ee kee ayaa ugu xidhan — ma saadaalinaysaa culeys lab ah ama isku dhufasho?
somali.where_on_each_axis_does_the_trainable_: Halkee dhinac kasta aagga "la tababari karo" ku dhammaado oo "cadaadiska" ku bilaabmo?
somali.if_wind_goes_to_30kt_what_minimum_sepa: Haddii dabayshu gaadho 30kt, kala fogaansho ugu yar oo kee ayaa culeyska deggan ka dhigaya?
somali.could_a_faster_decision_timeout_compen: Ma noqon kartaa waqti go'aan degdeg ah inuu magdhabo kala fogaansho cidhiidhi ah, mise wuxuu ka dhigayaa arrimaha ka sii xun?
somali.i_can_explain_in_my_own_words_why_this: Waan sharaxi karaa —ereyadayda gaarka ah— sababta uu isku-darkan sliderku u bixiyo culeyskan.
somali.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Aaladda baadhista — dhibco ma jiraan, daaha ma jiro, jawaab tuurid ma jirto. Dhis aragtidaada gaarka ah.
somali.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: adiga oo isticmaalaya erayo maalmeed oo fudud iyo jumlado gaaban
somali.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: ardayga fasalka 5, si kooban iyo saaxiibtinimo
somali.for_a_high_school_student_studying_pre: ardayga dugsiga sare ee baranaya precalculus ama fiisigis
somali.click_explain_for_a_plain_language_bre: Guji "Sharax" si aad u hesho sharraxaad luqad fudud oo fikradda ATC.
somali.air_traffic_control_radar_display_use_: Bandhigga raadaarka kontoroolka taraafikada hawada. Isticmaal Tab si aad u beddesho diyaaradaha, H jihada, R waddada duulista, C oggolaanshaha soo dhawaanshaha, Space joojinta, I koobida xaaladda.
somali.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_atc_radar: Beddel shaashadda buuxda ee raadaarka ATC

lingala.land_your_first_aircraft: Kitisa mpepo na yo ya liboso
lingala.land_a_heavy_or_super_aircraft: Kitisa mpepo ya Heavy to Super
lingala.guide_aircraft_safely_solve_rate_probl: Kamba mpepo na libateli. Silisa mikakatano ya vitesse. Yeba matematiki ya mpepo malamu.
lingala.light_traffic_generous_spacing_good_fo: Trafiki ya pete, esika monene — malamu mpo na bakambi ya sika.
lingala.manageable_load_focus_on_technique_wit: Mokumba oyo ekoki kosalema — tia likebi na tekiniki kozanga kotinda ya ntango.
lingala.realistic_airport_sequencing_required_: Libanda ya mpepo ya solo — molongo esengeli, kokutana ekoki kosalema.
lingala.high_load_expect_missed_approaches_fue: Mokumba monene — zela kozanga kopusana, kotinda ya mafuta.
lingala.saturated_staffing_runway_capacity_exc: Etondi — bokoki ya basali/banzela ya kopumbwa eleki.
lingala.ops_control_inquiry_widget: 🎚️ Bokambi ya misala — Esaleli ya boluki
lingala.move_five_operational_sliders_predict_: Pusa ba sliders mitano ya misala. Sakola ndenge moko na moko esalaka liboso ya kobanda session. Score te, kolakisa te — yo moko nde ozali kotala bososoli na yo.
lingala.your_hypothesis_what_combo_do_you_expe: Hypothèse na yo (eboti nini ozali kozela ete ekobuka misala liboso?)
lingala.e_g_low_separation_high_spawn_rate_com: ndakisa, bokaboli ya moke + motango ya kobima ya likolo esangisaka liboso ete mopepe ezala na ntina...
lingala.open_questions_no_answer_key: Mituna ya polele (fungola ya biyano te)
lingala.which_two_sliders_are_most_coupled_do_: Ba sliders mibale nini esangani mingi — ozali kosakola mokumba ya kobakisa to ya kozwisa?
lingala.where_on_each_axis_does_the_trainable_: Wapi na axe moko na moko zone ya "kokoka koyekola" esuki mpe "ya kotinda" ebandi?
lingala.if_wind_goes_to_30kt_what_minimum_sepa: Soki mopepe ekomi 30kt, bokaboli ya moke nini ebatela mokumba ya kobongwana te?
lingala.could_a_faster_decision_timeout_compen: Ntango ya ekateli ya mbangu ekoki kofuta bokaboli ya moke, to ekosala makambo mabe koleka?
lingala.i_can_explain_in_my_own_words_why_this: Nakoki kolimbola —na maloba na ngai moko— mpo na nini eboti oyo ya sliders epesaka mokumba oyo.
lingala.explain_in_your_own_words: Limbola na maloba na yo moko...
lingala.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Esaleli ya boluki — score te, kolakisa te, kobwaka biyano te. Tonga théorie na yo moko.
lingala.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: na kosalela maloba ya mokolo na mokolo ya pete mpe phrases ya mokuse
lingala.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: mpo na moyekoli ya kelasi 5, na mokuse mpe na boninga
lingala.for_a_high_school_student_studying_pre: mpo na moyekoli ya eteyelo ya likolo oyo azali koyekola precalculus to physique
lingala.click_explain_for_a_plain_language_bre: Finá "Limbola" mpo na ndimbola ya monoko ya pete ya likanisi ATC.
lingala.air_traffic_control_radar_display_use_: Bolakisi ya radar ya bokambi ya trafiki ya likolo. Salelá Tab mpo na kobongola mpepo, H mpo na esika, R mpo na nzela ya kopumbwa, C mpo na kopesa nzela ya kopusana, Space mpo na kotelemisa, I mpo na bokuse ya ezalela.
lingala.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_atc_radar: Bongola écran mobimba mpo na radar ATC

kinyarwanda.land_a_heavy_or_super_aircraft: Manura indege ya Heavy cyangwa Super
kinyarwanda.maintain_90_efficiency_with_10_landing: Komeza imikorere ya 90%+ hamwe no kugwa 10+
kinyarwanda.guide_aircraft_safely_solve_rate_probl: Yobora indege mu mutekano. Kemura ibibazo by'igipimo. Menya neza imibare y'indege.
kinyarwanda.light_traffic_generous_spacing_good_fo: Urujya n'uruza ruke, intera nini — byiza ku bagenzuzi bashya.
kinyarwanda.manageable_load_focus_on_technique_wit: Umutwaro ushobora gucungwa — ibande ku buhanga nta gahato k'igihe.
kinyarwanda.realistic_airport_sequencing_required_: Ikibuga cy'indege nyacyo — gukurikirana birakenewe, amakimbirane ashoboka.
kinyarwanda.high_load_expect_missed_approaches_fue: Umutwaro munini — tegereza kwegera kutagezweho, igitutu cya lisansi.
kinyarwanda.saturated_staffing_runway_capacity_exc: Byujuje — ubushobozi bw'abakozi/imihanda yo guhaguruka burengeje.
kinyarwanda.move_five_operational_sliders_predict_: Imura za sliders eshanu z'ibikorwa. Hanura uburyo buri kimwe gikorana mbere yo gutangira igice. Nta manota, nta guhishura — wowe ubwawe usuzuma ukumva kwawe.
kinyarwanda.your_hypothesis_what_combo_do_you_expe: Igitekerezo cyawe (ni iyihe nguhe utegereza ko izasenya ibikorwa mbere?)
kinyarwanda.e_g_low_separation_high_spawn_rate_com: urugero, itandukaniro rito + igipimo kinini cyo kugaragara biteranya mbere y'uko umuyaga uba ngombwa...
kinyarwanda.which_two_sliders_are_most_coupled_do_: Ni izihe sliders ebyiri zihujwe cyane — uhanura umutwaro wo kongeramo cyangwa wo gukuba?
kinyarwanda.where_on_each_axis_does_the_trainable_: Ni hehe kuri buri murongo agace "gashobora gutozwa" karangirira naho "gakomeye" gatangirira?
kinyarwanda.if_wind_goes_to_30kt_what_minimum_sepa: Niba umuyaga ugeze kuri 30kt, ni iryihe tandukaniro rito rigumana umutwaro uhamye?
kinyarwanda.could_a_faster_decision_timeout_compen: Igihe cy'icyemezo cyihuta cyaba gishobora kuziba itandukaniro rifunganye, cyangwa gituma ibintu birushaho kuba bibi?
kinyarwanda.i_can_explain_in_my_own_words_why_this: Nshobora gusobanura —mu magambo yanjye bwite— impamvu iyi nguhe ya sliders itanga uyu mutwaro.
kinyarwanda.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Igikoresho cy'iperereza — nta manota, nta guhishura, nta gutanga ibisubizo. Ubaka inyigisho yawe bwite.
kinyarwanda.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: ukoresheje amagambo yoroshye ya buri munsi n'interuro ngufi
kinyarwanda.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: ku munyeshuri w'umwaka wa 5, muri make kandi mu bucuti
kinyarwanda.for_a_high_school_student_studying_pre: ku munyeshuri w'amashuri yisumbuye wiga precalculus cyangwa fiziki
kinyarwanda.click_explain_for_a_plain_language_bre: Kanda "Sobanura" kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro by'ururimi rworoshye by'iki gitekerezo cya ATC.
kinyarwanda.air_traffic_control_radar_display_use_: Igaragaza rya radar yo kugenzura urujya n'uruza rwo mu kirere. Koresha Tab guhindura indege, H ku cyerekezo, R ku muhanda wo guhaguruka, C gutanga uruhushya rwo kwegera, Space guhagarika, I ku ncamake y'imimerere.
kinyarwanda.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_atc_radar: Hindura ecran yuzuye kuri radar ya ATC
